# Copilot Instructions for Portfolio Project

This is a personal portfolio website for Sebastian Solares, a Full Stack Engineer.

## Project Overview
- Static HTML/CSS/JS portfolio deployed on Vercel
- Uses Angular, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS in production projects
- Design focuses on modern, distinctive UI with enterprise-grade aesthetics

## Guidelines
- Prefer vanilla HTML/CSS/JS for this project (no build step required)
- Follow existing CSS variable conventions for colors and spacing
- Keep animations smooth and performant (use CSS transitions where possible)
- Maintain responsive design for all screen sizes

## Model
This repository is configured to use **Claude Sonnet** as the default AI model for GitHub Copilot chat and completions.
